sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: Minimal pitch-tracking synthesizer. Detects pitch from live audio input using aubio YIN and drives an oscillator at the detected frequency.

sections.heading: Signal Path
sections.body: Audio In → aubio YIN Pitch Detection → Oscillator → Output

sections.heading: Input
sections.body: input_gain: scales the incoming audio before pitch detection. pitch_confidence: minimum YIN confidence (0–1) required to lock on to a pitch — raise in noisy environments. pitch_smooth: one-pole smoother on the detected frequency; higher values give a more legato pitch glide.

sections.heading: Oscillator
sections.body: Four waveforms: sine, triangle, saw (default), square. osc_detune offsets the output pitch in cents (±100). osc_level sets the oscillator amplitude.

sections.heading: Chain Use
sections.body: Place as an audio effect in a Signal Chain patch. Hardware knobs map to: Confidence, Detune, Level, Volume.
